description_long: This house features a modern, low-profile design with a flat roof and clean, rectangular lines. The structure is composed of two main sections: a larger primary living area and a smaller detached or semi-detached unit, possibly a garage or auxiliary space. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with large window panels along the main facade, allowing for ample natural light. A spacious paved area, likely serving as a driveway or courtyard, is situated between the two main sections. The roof is flat and extends slightly beyond the walls, providing a subtle overhang. The overall layout suggests a single-story residence with an emphasis on open, functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious paved courtyard between two main sections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, the primary living area on the right, and a smaller auxiliary structure on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the main building and the separation between the two structures, with the paved area visible in between.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of both structures and the full extent of the paved courtyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the auxiliary structure in the foreground and the main building behind, with the courtyard to the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal panels
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, wide steps, and large glass panels
